meaning: 密克隆岛[北美洲东部](在纽芬兰岛之南,法属)
examples: And St Pierre et Miquelon aren't France's only contribution to the fascinating world of geopolitical farce.
Saint Pierre and Miquelon each elect a representative to participate in the French National Assembly and the Senate.
An area of 242 square kilometers, of which 25 sq km island of St. Pierre, Miquelon, 110 square kilometers, Langlade island of 91 square kilometers.
St Pierre is connected to Miquelon by a sandy isthmus, and is about an hour away by boat.
On St Pierre a three-bed, two-bath house is 180, 000 euros, while houses on Miquelon are smaller but with more land and cost about half that.
